description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named NeL: CI / CD that runs on push to specific branches and paths, and on pull requests to core4 branch with specific paths. The workflow has two jobs: strings and build. The strings job sets reusable strings and outputs them. The build job, which depends on strings, runs on a matrix of ubuntu-22.04 and ubuntu-24.04, checks out the code, installs CMake, sets up dependencies on Linux, configures CMake, builds, tests, and packages the project, then uploads the package as an artifact.
